name: green-driver-weapp
description: 绿化管理系统 - 司机微信小程序

scripts.build: npm run build:ts && npm run build:scss
scripts.watch:scss: node build-scss.js && sass --watch --style=expanded --no-source-map app.scss:app.wxss pages/admin:pages/admin pages/driver:pages/driver pages/index:pages/index
scripts.watch: npm run watch:ts & npm run watch:scss
